prompt:
nh-sermorelin-10ml-yellow: Exact-reproduction edit. The REFERENCE IMAGE is an approved CLEAN pharmaceutical vial photo. Output an image IDENTICAL to the reference EXCEPT change the PRODUCT NAME to "Sermorelin".

KEEP IDENTICAL: the same camera framing, zoom, crop and vial scale; the same clear-glass vial; the same yellow cap (color/shape/angle); the same opaque matte-white wrap-around label at the same width and position; the SAME dose-and-volume line "xx mg · 10 ml"; the same two compliance lines "FOR RESEARCH USE ONLY" / "NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION"; the same "LOT: NH-1024"; the same typography (typeface, weights, sizes, letter spacing, centering) for ALL text; the same bottom accent bar; the same lighting, reflection and soft contact shadow.

BACKGROUND — CRITICAL: render the ENTIRE background as flawless, perfectly uniform, pure white #FFFFFF seamless studio sweep — absolutely NO smudges, grey patches, dust, blotches, cloudiness or marks anywhere, except the soft contact shadow directly beneath the vial.

THE ONLY CHANGE: replace the product name with "Sermorelin", rendered in the EXACT same font, bold weight, size, charcoal-grey color and centered position as the reference product name. Spell it exactly "Sermorelin". Do not change anything else. Crisp text, no misspellings. Vertical 4:5 portrait, premium clinical product photography.

THE ONLY CHANGE: replace the product name with "MOTS-C", rendered in the EXACT same font, bold weight, size, charcoal-grey color and centered position as the reference product name.
